evidence: The team devotes significant resources to our cybersecurity risk management, which focuses on developing and implementing strategies and processes to protect the confidentiality, integrity, and availability of our assets
We have adopted governance policies and procedures related to artificial intelligence development, deployment and monitoring.

limitations: ai_investment_intensity: No quantified AI-specific spend, headcount, or named vendor/infrastructure partnerships disclosed in excerpts; generic resource commitment language only.

ai_narrative_concreteness: AI use cases are named (cybersecurity risk mitigation, governance policies, competitive advertising analytics) but no deployment metrics or quantified outcomes are provided; scored 3 rather than 4.

ai_risk_disclosure_depth: Risk-section material is present and discusses AI risks with company-specific mechanisms (competitive disadvantage, cybersecurity exploitation, regulatory compliance costs), supporting score 4; however no quantified risk treatment or named oversight body beyond the Executive Cybersecurity Steering Committee is disclosed, limiting score to 4.
